title: County picks national contractor for building $1 billion Micron wastewater plant
summary: Onondaga County has selected a national contractor to build a $1 billion wastewater treatment plant to handle Micron Technology's industrial waste. This represents the largest county construction project in history and signals major economic development infrastructure investment tied to the Micron semiconductor facility.
department_refs: Department of Economic Development and Planning

political_signal.description: County-level infrastructure investment supporting major private sector economic development; signals regional prioritization of Micron facility support and manufacturing sector growth.
